creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
That patch (which I also tried before you attached it) fails:

[00:00:09] gmake[1]: *** No rule to make target '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/node22/work/node-v22.13.1/out/Release/obj.target/nghttp3/deps/ngtcp2/nghttp3/lib/sfparse.o', needed by '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/node22/work/node-v22.13.1/out/Release/obj.target/deps/ngtcp2/libnghttp3.a'.  Stop.
[00:00:09] gmake[1]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
[00:00:09]   cc -o /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/node22/work/node-v22.13.1/out/Release/obj.target/nghttp3/deps/ngtcp2/nghttp3/lib/nghttp3_version.o ../deps/ngtcp2/nghttp3/lib/nghttp3_version.c '-D_U_=' '-D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=1' '-DNODE_OPENSSL_CONF_NAME=nodejs_conf' '-DNODE_OPENSSL_HAS_QUIC' '-DICU_NO_USER_DATA_OVERRIDE' '-D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS' '-DOPENSSL_NO_PINSHARED' '-DOPENSSL_THREADS' '-DBUILDING_NGHTTP3' '-DNGHTTP3_STATICLIB' '-DHAVE_UNISTD_H' '-DNGTCP2_STATICLIB' -I../deps/ngtcp2/nghttp3/lib/includes -I../deps/ngtcp2/nghttp3/lib -I../deps/ngtcp2 -I../deps/ngtcp2/ngtcp2/lib/includes -I../deps/ngtcp2/ngtcp2/crypto/includes -I../deps/ngtcp2/ngtcp2/crypto  -pthread -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -m64 -O3 -fno-omit-frame-pointer  -MMD -MF /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/node22/work/node-v22.13.1/out/Release/.deps//wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/node22/work/node-v22.13.1/out/Release/obj.target/nghttp3/deps/ngtcp2/nghttp3/lib/nghttp3_version.o.d.raw -isystem /usr/local/include -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -c
[00:00:09] rm 82eee469997d275f54ebc326adb58918dca11386.intermediate
